docker-cleanup.description: Docker system maintenance -- recover disk space without nuking active workloads

commands.comment: disk usage breakdown by images, containers, volumes

commands.cmd: docker images -f dangling=true -q | xargs -r docker rmi
commands.comment: remove dangling images (untagged layers from rebuilds)

commands.cmd: docker volume ls -f dangling=true -q | xargs -r docker volume rm
commands.comment: remove orphaned volumes -- check before running
clear build cache older than 3 days
